name: Lime-Mint Tea on Ice
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 to 2 cups loosely packed fresh mint leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the boiling water and tea bags in a large pitcher.
2. Add the mint leaves and sugar, then cover the pitcher.
3. Steep for 20 minutes.
4. Remove the tea bags and discard the mint leaves.
5. Cool the mixture to room temperature.
6. Stir in the lime juice.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
8. Serve over ice and garnish with lime slices.
Makes 1 quart.
